chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-632 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2022. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Shoukat Ali Kaka, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Nazar Siyal, Advocate a/w complainant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J- It is stated that complainant had invested an amount of Rs.55,00,000/- in a housing scheme of the applicant through an agreement but then he did not pay him any profits nor his original money and instead issued him two cheques of Rs.18,00,000/- which on presentation were dishonoured, resulting in current FIR against him. However, today complainant and his Counsel both are present and have filed no objection in the shape of affidavit to confirmation of bail on the ground that they have compromised outside of the Court. 2. Learned Assistant P.G in view of above has also recorded no objection. The main offence under Section 489-F PPC is compoundable and there is no impediment, legal or otherwise in accepting no objection of the complainant. Accordingly, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. JUDGE Shahid
